final_message:
Done. All 6 tests pass (`6 passed in 0.01s`).

Two bugs were in `lrucache/cache.py`:

- `get` didn't refresh recency — a hit returned the value but left the key at its old position, so recently-read entries were evicted first. Added `move_to_end` on hit (`lrucache/cache.py:31`).
- `put` evicted an entry even when updating an existing key — the capacity check ran unconditionally. Now eviction only happens for new keys (`lrucache/cache.py:34`).

`SOLUTION.md` is written with the root-cause explanation. Note: `pytest` wasn't installed system-wide, so I ran the suite via a local venv (`.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`); no test files were touched and no commits made.
